'''鈭歳-l-zh''' ('''ralazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:impeach|impeach]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-l-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:impeach|impeach]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-l-zh
|-
! Lemma
| ralazha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ralazhithi|ralazhithi]] || [[word:ralazhiji|ralazhiji]] || [[word:ralazhishi|ralazhishi]] || [[word:ralazhi|ralazhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ralazhuthuth|ralazhuthuth]] || [[word:ralazhujuj|ralazhujuj]] || [[word:ralazhushush|ralazhushush]] || [[word:ralazh|ralazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ralazhuthu|ralazhuthu]] || [[word:ralazhuju|ralazhuju]] || [[word:ralazhushu|ralazhushu]] || [[word:ralazhu|ralazhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ralazhufuth|ralazhufuth]] || [[word:ralazhufuj|ralazhufuj]] || [[word:ralazhufush|ralazhufush]] || [[word:ralazhuf|ralazhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ralazhethe|ralazhethe]] || [[word:ralazheje|ralazheje]] || [[word:ralazheshe|ralazheshe]] || [[word:ralazhe|ralazhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ralazhothoth|ralazhothoth]] || [[word:ralazhojoj|ralazhojoj]] || [[word:ralazhoshosh|ralazhoshosh]] || [[word:ralazh|ralazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ralazhotho|ralazhotho]] || [[word:ralazhojo|ralazhojo]] || [[word:ralazhosho|ralazhosho]] || [[word:ralazho|ralazho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ralazhofoth|ralazhofoth]] || [[word:ralazhofoj|ralazhofoj]] || [[word:ralazhofosh|ralazhofosh]] || [[word:ralazhof|ralazhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ralazh忙th忙|ralazh忙th忙]] || [[word:ralazh忙j忙|ralazh忙j忙]] || [[word:ralazh忙sh忙|ralazh忙sh忙]] || [[word:ralazh忙|ralazh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ralazhathath|ralazhathath]] || [[word:ralazhajaj|ralazhajaj]] || [[word:ralazhashash|ralazhashash]] || [[word:ralazh|ralazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ralazhatha|ralazhatha]] || [[word:ralazhaja|ralazhaja]] || [[word:ralazhasha|ralazhasha]] || [[word:ralazha|ralazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ralazhafath|ralazhafath]] || [[word:ralazhafaj|ralazhafaj]] || [[word:ralazhafash|ralazhafash]] || [[word:ralazhaf|ralazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ralazhasha|ralazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goralazhasha|goralazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiralazhasha|gokiralazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ralazhn眉sha|ralazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goralazhnkn眉sha|goralazhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiralazhn眉sha|gokiralazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ralazhsh毛sha|ralazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goralazhnksh毛sha|goralazhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiralazhsh毛sha|gokiralazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ralazhrosha|ralazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goralazhnkrosha|goralazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiralazhrosha|gokiralazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ralazhmusha|ralazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goralazhnkmusha|goralazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiralazhmusha|gokiralazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ralazhsherasha|ralazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goralazhnksherasha|goralazhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiralazhsherasha|gokiralazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ralazhngasha|ralazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goralazhnkngasha|goralazhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiralazhngasha|gokiralazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ralazhyasha|ralazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goralazhnkyasha|goralazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiralazhyasha|gokiralazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ralazhyamasha|ralazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goralazhnkyamasha|goralazhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiralazhyamasha|gokiralazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ralazhn眉sh毛sha|ralazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goralazhnkn眉sh毛sha|goralazhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiralazhn眉sh毛sha|gokiralazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ralazhn眉rosha|ralazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goralazhnkn眉rosha|goralazhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiralazhn眉rosha|gokiralazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ralazhn眉musha|ralazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goralazhnkn眉musha|goralazhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiralazhn眉musha|gokiralazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ralazhsh毛n眉sha|ralazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goralazhnksh毛n眉sha|goralazhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiralazhsh毛n眉sha|gokiralazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ralazhsh毛rosha|ralazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goralazhnksh毛rosha|goralazhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiralazhsh毛rosha|gokiralazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ralazhsh毛musha|ralazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goralazhnksh毛musha|goralazhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiralazhsh毛musha|gokiralazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ralazhron眉sha|ralazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goralazhnkron眉sha|goralazhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiralazhron眉sha|gokiralazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ralazhrosh毛sha|ralazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goralazhnkrosh毛sha|goralazhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiralazhrosh毛sha|gokiralazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ralazhromusha|ralazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goralazhnkromusha|goralazhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiralazhromusha|gokiralazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ralazhmun眉sha|ralazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goralazhnkmun眉sha|goralazhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiralazhmun眉sha|gokiralazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ralazhmush毛sha|ralazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goralazhnkmush毛sha|goralazhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiralazhmush毛sha|gokiralazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ralazhmurosha|ralazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goralazhnkmurosha|goralazhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiralazhmurosha|gokiralazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ralazh|ralazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:r忙l忙zh|r忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:horalazh|horalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hor忙l忙zh|hor忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoralazh|hohoralazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohor忙l忙zh|hohor忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ralazh|n眉ralazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉r忙l忙zh|n眉r忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ralazh|n眉n眉ralazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉r忙l忙zh|n眉n眉r忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ralazh|n茂ralazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂r忙l忙zh|n茂r忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ralazh|n茂n茂ralazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂r忙l忙zh|n茂n茂r忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luralazh|luralazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lur忙l忙zh|lur忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluralazh|luluralazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulur忙l忙zh|lulur忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liralazh|liralazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lir忙l忙zh|lir忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliralazh|liliralazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilir忙l忙zh|lilir忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koralazh|koralazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kor忙l忙zh|kor忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoralazh|kokoralazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokor忙l忙zh|kokor忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keralazh|keralazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ker忙l忙zh|ker忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeralazh|kekeralazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keker忙l忙zh|keker忙l忙zh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
